specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition throughout every season. We work with boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, bringing a comprehensive range of specialized marine services right to where you need them.

Our team handles everything from thorough boat surveying and inspection — whether you're buying, selling, or just want peace of mind — to diving and underwater services that keep your hull, running gear, and through-hulls in solid shape without hauling out. We also specialize in marine AC and climate control systems, keeping your cabin comfortable on the water no matter the conditions. And when it comes to marine plumbing and sanitation, we take care of everything from holding tanks and heads to through-hull fittings and bilge systems, done right and up to code.

At Ben's Boatworks, we understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way. We serve boat owners throughout the Annapolis, MD area and across South Florida — from weekend cruisers to liveaboards — with honest, reliable work and a commitment to getting the job done properly. Whether you're docked in the Chesapeake Bay region or out on South Florida waters, you can count on Ben's Boatworks to show up ready to work.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!
seoKeywords: boat plumbing and sanitation South Florida

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A professional boat survey covers a thorough evaluation of a vessel's structural integrity, mechanical systems, safety equipment, and overall condition. Whether you're purchasing a used boat, renewing insurance, or preparing for a sale, a detailed marine inspection gives you a clear picture of what you're working with and what needs attention.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater diving services allow for hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and through-hull assessments without the time and cost of a full haulout. Regular underwater maintenance keeps your running gear clean and your vessel performing efficiently between haul cycles.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning and climate control systems require specialized knowledge of refrigerant handling, raw water cooling circuits, and the unique demands of a saltwater environment. Proper installation, routine service, and timely repairs keep your onboard HVAC system running efficiently and reliably through heavy use seasons.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation work covers head systems, holding tanks, Y-valves, macerators, bilge pumps, and all associated through-hull fittings and hoses. Keeping these systems properly maintained and compliant with marine sanitation regulations protects both your vessel and the water around it.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within 60 miles.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Hull and running gear inspection via underwater diving services
Zinc anode replacement and propeller check without hauling out
Marine AC system repair and raw water cooling circuit service
Holding tank and marine head replacement or repair
Through-hull fitting inspection and seacock service or replacement
Bilge pump system inspection, repair, and hose replacement
